display_name_cn: 二次元少女与男生约会拼贴3x3

subject.描述: A 3x3 photo collage of 9 warm, cinematic lifestyle snapshots featuring [man_subject] and [anime_girl_subject] posed together as casual date photos. The male character must be rendered as a real live-action human in every panel, never anime-stylized. The female character must be rendered as a clearly anime / 2D illustrated character in every panel, never realistic live-action. The collage must maintain [required_keyword] for both recurring subjects across all 9 panels, especially the anime girl’s face, hairstyle, body proportions, outfit, and identity

特征: tight grid with thin white dividers
male character must stay fully realistic live-action
female character must stay clearly anime / cel-shaded / 2D
must be a real adult human male
plain dark navy or black long-sleeve shirt
male face naturally de-emphasized in a candid lifestyle-photo way, but never blurred, censored, pixelated, mosaicked, or artificially obscured
must be a clearly anime-style / manga-style / 2D illustrated young woman
never converted into a realistic human
layered silver necklaces including a cross pendant

integration.描述: Blend realistic photography with a convincingly integrated 2D anime character. The man must remain fully realistic and photographic; the girl must remain clearly anime / cel-shaded / 2D. Match scene lighting, perspective, focus, and color grading so they appear naturally present together without collapsing either character style

构图: vertical poster canvas with a 3x3 collage of 9 tightly gridded panels

typography.排版逻辑: 3x3 约会拼贴模板；允许封面式图文排版，但核心主体必须始终保持 [required_keyword]。男角色必须强制真人化，女角色必须强制二次元/动漫化。以后调用该模板时，生成提示词必须保留关键词‘100% 一致性’

层级.字体: 高对比纤细衬线体或现代中文宋体
中等字重黑体或衬线体

typography.文字规则: 模板关键词中必须携带‘100% 一致性’，调用时也必须保留该关键词

避免: anime girl changing hairstyle or clothes between frames
both characters rendered in the same visual medium
loss of anime cel-shaded look for the girl
loss of realistic photographic look for the man

defaults.title_text: Anime Girl and Man Date Photo Collage 3x3
defaults.subtitle_text: 二次元少女与男生约会拼贴3x3
defaults.poster_style: anime girl + real man date photo collage poster
defaults.man_subject: a real adult man with short dark hair, light skin, average build, wearing a plain dark navy or black long-sleeve shirt
defaults.anime_girl_subject: an anime-style young woman companion with long blonde twin ponytails, large blue eyes, light skin, slim petite build, black sleeveless top, layered silver necklaces including a cross pendant, black wrist accessories, a red plaid pleated mini skirt, and black-and-white striped thigh-high socks
defaults.background_scene: urban evening interiors and city night environments suitable for candid date snapshots
defaults.lighting_style: moody evening tones with soft bokeh
defaults.panel_1: close indoor portrait with both seated close together, the girl resting beside him
defaults.panel_2: nighttime city street side profile conversation under blurred streetlights
defaults.panel_3: indoors, both reading a book together, the girl leaning on his shoulder
defaults.panel_4: outdoor cafe table, both holding takeaway coffee cups
defaults.panel_5: restaurant table with multiple dishes visible, dining together
defaults.panel_6: mirror selfie in an elevator, the man holding a smartphone while the girl makes a peace sign
defaults.panel_7: car interior road-trip shot, the man driving and the anime girl in the passenger seat
defaults.panel_8: seaside sunset from behind, both sitting side by side watching the ocean
defaults.panel_9: neon-lit city night portrait, the girl pointing toward the camera
